title: Implement actor skill packet writer and fixtures
description: Add the runtime command and schema/fixture coverage needed to write actor skill packet artifacts. The command should make a concrete assignment packet reproducible for a single actor and include source_task_id and source_parent_session_id provenance.
triage_notes: Completed TASK-050: actor-skill-packet-record now writes schema-valid actor skill packets with source_task_id and source_parent_session_id provenance; fixture ASP-TASK-050-BUILDER validates; CLI rejects missing skill evidence; runtime proof written to /tmp/aof-task050-actor-skill-packet.json.
